summary: Growth Engine Testing Complete - All features verified. Share page /share/:shareId renders with all growth elements (title, CTA block, primary create button, remix button, value props, share tools). Backend APIs (GET /api/share/{share_id}, POST /api/share/{shareId}/fork, GET /api/story-engine/first-video-free) all working correctly. Remix button successfully calls fork API and prefills story-video-studio with parent data. My Space regression passed (3 sections, auto-download toggle, notification toggle).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Engine features fully tested. Share page has all required data-testids. Fork/remix API increments fork count and returns prefill data. First-video-free endpoint returns eligible=true for anonymous, eligible=false for test user with existing videos. Video player not shown for test share (expected - no video URL in DB).

tests: data-testid='cta-block' with 'Create your own video in 30 seconds' text
data-testid='primary-create-btn' with 'Create Your Video — Free' text
data-testid='value-props' with 'Made with AI', 'No editing needed', 'Free to start'
Returns videoUrl field (null for test share - expected)
View count increments on each request
Returns fork object with parentShareId, parentTitle, storyContext, type
Fork count increments after fork request
Returns eligible=true, reason='new_user' for anonymous users
Returns eligible=false, reason='has_videos' for authenticated test user
Story Video Studio shows 'Remixing: Test Pipeline Rate Limit' banner
Title prefilled with 'From: Test Pipeline Rate Limit'
In Progress section visible with count badge (10 items)

notes.video_player: Video player (data-testid='video-player') not shown for test share 96902ad4-066 because the linked job df24d454-1c9f-49c1-8622-b1037a92e372 has no output_url (was a test pipeline run). This is expected behavior - the page correctly shows CTA block without video.
notes.first_video_free_logic: First-video-free logic in POST /api/story-engine/create (lines 558-572) checks if user has 0 previous jobs and sets skip_credits=True. Endpoint GET /api/story-engine/first-video-free (lines 1700-1710) returns eligibility status.
